figures.caption: Table 3: Attack success rate (%) under Assume-Compromise Evaluation. Config A: no Shield. Config C: full Parallax.

Figure 1: The Parallax architecture. The agent (untrusted, sandboxed) proposes actions via gRPC. Shield validates each action through four tiers of graduated determinism; actions that fail validation are blocked. Only validated actions reach the executor. IFC tags propagate data sensitivity into Shield for context-aware evaluation. Chronicle captures state before destructive actions. The agent cannot access or modify any component of the engine process.
